data.description: A skilled hunter and warrior, rangers are adept at ranged combat and tracking

features.name: Hunter's Prey
features.description: Extra damage to creatures below hit point maximum

features.name: Ranger's Companion
features.description: Beast companion that fights alongside you

features.name: Defensive Tactics
features.description: Ability to command beast to take defensive actions

features.name: Multiattack
features.description: Can make multiple attacks with a single action

features.name: Share Spells
features.description: Can affect beast companion with area effects

features.name: Beast Master
features.description: Embodying a friendship between the civilized races and the beasts of the world
